name: Lyra Moonwhisper
features: Race|Darkvision|See in dim light within 60 ft.;;Class|Arcane Recovery|Recover spell slots on a short rest, once per day.;;Feat|War Caster|Advantage on CON saves to maintain concentration.
background_info:
## Personality
Curious to a fault.

**Ideal:** Knowledge.
**Bond:** My spellbook is my life's work.
**Flaw:** I overlook danger when a mystery beckons.
notes: Met the party in Waterdeep. Searching for her missing mentor, Old Galen.
